productDisplayName: Wrangler Men's Wanderer's Dream Sky T-shirt
description: CompositionSky blue round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton with embroidered lettering on the frontFittingSlimWash care Light machine wash Do not bleach Warm iron on reverse Do not dry clean Dry flat/ reverse Do not scrub Indulge in the fantasy of leaving civilisation far behind and travelling to wild forgotten places.
